Document:
# Mice
Mice are tiny creatures that have lived aboard the station far longer than most of the crew. They squeeze through vents, steal crumbs, and occasionally squeak at passersby.
As a mouse you are [bold]very small[/bold] — small enough to slip under doors, into vents, and into spaces no crew member can reach. You can speak, though your squeaky voice may not command much authority.
You have [bold]no offensive capabilities[/bold] and cannot harm crew members. You are harmless by nature.
## Variants
- [bold]Mouse[/bold] — a perfectly ordinary station mouse. Squeak. - [bold]Cancer Mouse[/bold] — a mouse that glows an eerie green from too much time spent near the genetics lab. Emits mild [color=LightGreen]radiation[/color], which may concern nearby crew members.
